statement: Provisional convention: e_kappa is kept outside epsilon_vac_config until the kappa-zeta map is derived. epsilon_vac_config = 1/2 K_zeta (zeta-zeta_min)^2 + 1/2 L_zeta |grad zeta|^2. K_lock is treated as a diagnostic/constraint target, not physical energy. This convention must be revisited after the kappa-zeta map is derived.

messages: Tier 2 claim lacks reason, provenance, evidence, or obligation links.
